risk_title: Political and Governance Risk - Substantial Rating Maintained
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain at Substantial level, indicating ongoing fragility in the institutional and political environment affecting project implementation in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Proposed Rating: Substantial (Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 09 - 07 May 2024: Substantial)

risk_title: Conflict-Affected Region - Khyber Agency Archaeological Site Conservation
risk_summary: Project is implementing conservation activities at Shapola Stupa in Khyber Agency, a historically conflict-affected area, with ongoing security considerations for site access and staff safety during phase II conservation work.
evidence_quote: Of these, the notable renovated/conserved sites are Bhamala Stupa (Haripur), Shapola Stupa (Khyber Agency), Udigram Mosque (Swat) and Hund Museum (Swabi).

risk_summary: Project is restoring 16 flood-damaged archaeological sites by February 2025, with restoration activities occurring in areas with historical conflict exposure (Swat, Chitral, and other KP districts), creating potential access and security vulnerabilities.
evidence_quote: The restoration of 16 flood damaged sites will be complete by Feb 2025.
